title: Hornet Removal in West Farms, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in West Farms, Bronx. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed exterminators serving residential & commercial properties. Call now!
intro: West Farms residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional removal services to protect their families and properties. Best Pest Control NYC specializes in safe hornet nest elimination throughout West Farms, from multi-family buildings near the Bronx Zoo to homes along Boston Road. Our experienced technicians provide comprehensive hornet removal services with pricing between $350-$550 depending on nest location and severity.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving West Farms and the greater Bronx area with licensed, insured hornet removal specialists who understand the unique challenges of urban pest control. We offer same-day emergency services, use environmentally responsible treatment methods, and provide warranty protection to ensure hornets don't return to your West Farms property.
localContext: West Farms' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes near Bronx Park East, and commercial properties along Southern Boulevard creates diverse nesting opportunities for hornets, particularly in eaves, attics, and tree canopies. The neighborhood's proximity to the Bronx River and green spaces like the Botanical Garden means hornet activity peaks from late spring through early fall, making professional removal essential for residents and businesses alike.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in West Farms?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout West Farms. Emergency situations involving nests near entrances or high-traffic areas receive priority scheduling. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, though larger nests or difficult-to-access locations may require additional time.

faqs.question: What determines the cost of hornet removal in West Farms?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal pricing between $350-$550 depends on several factors including nest size, location accessibility, height requirements, and infestation severity. Ground-level nests are typically on the lower end, while nests in attics, high eaves, or requiring specialized equipment fall toward the higher range. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are hornet removal treatments safe for my West Farms home and family?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect your family, pets, and property. Our technicians are trained in targeted application methods that eliminate hornets while minimizing environmental impact. We provide clear instructions for re-entry times and any necessary precautions, typically allowing residents to return within a few hours.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee hornets won't return to my West Farms property?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive service warranty. After removing the nest, we treat the area to prevent re-infestation and provide guidance on exclusion methods to keep hornets from rebuilding. If hornets return to the treated area within the warranty period, we'll come back at no additional charge to address the problem.
